main.title: Middle East Tensions Escalate as Regional Strikes Continue
main.summary: New coordinated strikes in the Middle East have caused widespread concern. Retaliatory actions and airspace closures continue, impacting global trade and travel.

breaking.title: Airspace Restrictions in Gulf Cause Flight Delays
breaking.summary: Flights across major Gulf cities have been canceled or rerouted due to airspace closures.

breaking.title: World Leaders Urge Diplomatic Resolution
breaking.summary: Global leaders call for restraint as regional tensions intensify.

nigeria.title: Nigeria’s World Cup Qualification in FIFA Dispute
nigeria.summary: Super Eagles await FIFA decision over eligibility issues that could affect their 2026 World Cup bid.

nigeria.title: Oil Prices Rise, Supporting Naira Despite Inflation Risks
nigeria.summary: Rising oil prices provide temporary relief for Nigeria’s foreign exchange liquidity, but inflation remains a concern.

europe.title: EU Condemns Middle East Escalation
europe.summary: European Union officials urge for diplomacy and de-escalation in the region.

america.title: US Confirms Role in Regional Strikes
america.summary: The United States acknowledges involvement in recent Middle East strikes, emphasizing international security concerns.

africa.title: African Union Calls for Regional Restraint
africa.summary: The AU warns that ongoing conflict risks destabilizing African economies and security.

asia.title: Asian Airlines Report Disruptions Amid Global Flight Reroutes
asia.summary: Airlines across Asia experience flight cancellations due to Middle East airspace closures.

business.title: OPEC+ Announces Modest Oil Production Increase
business.summary: OPEC+ raises oil output slightly to stabilize markets while geopolitical risks persist.

sport.title: Nigeria Awaits FIFA Verdict on World Cup Qualification
sport.summary: Super Eagles’ World Cup hopes hinge on eligibility ruling from FIFA.
